source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the proposal merge commit so the evaluator sees this proposal artifact; implementation requires at least 3a04282a22036915b9ad193ee2351dd2cf19dc64.

requested_items.objective: Apply practical SRAM-bank, local-buffer, and endpoint NoC service caps to the retained Llama7B topology-derived dense-tile scheduler frontier.

expected_result.reason: The result should report slowdown versus topology-derived scheduling and identify whether topology, SRAM-bank service, or endpoint service caps the retained frontier.
